turns.speaker: D
turns.text: patient shirley taylor . date of birth 5/4/1961 . mrn 0000123 . patient is a 60 year old right-handed female new patient referred by dr. jacob ward for evaluation of bilateral hand numbness and tingling . please note that Dr. Lopez personally reviewed the ct brain with and without contrasting did 2/5/21 . uh , no metastatic disease . no acute intercranial abnormalities . hello ms. taylor . how is Shirley Taylor doing this morning ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi dr . lopez . this weekend was a bit rough . Shirley Taylor has had the numbness and tingling for a few weeks now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , in both of Shirley Taylor's hands ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . ever since Shirley Taylor's car wreck last december when Shirley Taylor broke Shirley Taylor's wrists . well , once Shirley Taylor's wrists heal , Shirley Taylor means , Shirley Taylor noticed the numbness and tingling more , the , the tingling and numbness .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: is Shirley Taylor still wearing the splint only on Shirley Taylor's right wrist ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no . Shirley Taylor wears the left splint also sometimes . the right wrist is just worse . the splint seems to help . both wrists have gotten worse over the last month . when Shirley Taylor broke Shirley Taylor's wrists though , Shirley Taylor's wrist was definitely in worse shape than Shirley Taylor's wrist is today . Shirley Taylor has been having some mild stiffness in Shirley Taylor's neck too . Shirley Taylor hit Shirley Taylor's head during the accident , and the emergency department told Shirley Taylor that Shirley Taylor's head injury was a contusion .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and where exactly on the right side would Dr. Lopez say the tingling and numbness is ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: on the right , Shirley Taylor can really notice the tingling and numbness from Shirley Taylor's middle and ring finger all the way up to Shirley Taylor's forearm , and on Shirley Taylor's left , the tingling and numbness is a bit more in the pinky and the ring and not the middle .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . and , um , is there is pain or , or just tingling and numbness ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , mainly just sore . sometimes Shirley Taylor's wrists throb , but overall , Shirley Taylor's wrists feel weaker too , especially when Shirley Taylor is using Shirley Taylor's wrists . the tingling happens some more , but when Shirley Taylor's wrists hurt , you know , the wrist pain goes away and then the tingling's just dull .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what kind of activities ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , really , Shirley Taylor guesses , just more so at night , and then the numbness and tingling just kind of comes and goes throughout the day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and does Shirley Taylor experience any loss of sensation in Shirley Taylor's hands or fingers ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , like , like feeling something ? no , not that Shirley Taylor can think of really . in general , Shirley Taylor's hands might be less sensitive than Shirley Taylor's hands should be , but Shirley Taylor can still feel . the emergency department gave Shirley Taylor some nerve pain medicine , but Shirley Taylor has n't been taking the nerve pain medicine like Shirley Taylor should be .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . looks like Shirley Taylor's medical history is notable for chronic kidney disease , gout , hypertension , anxiety , gerd , and diabetes .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , Shirley Taylor had pre-diabetes , but Shirley Taylor got pre-diabetes under control changing Shirley Taylor's diet .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . good . and is Shirley Taylor still on the carvedilol 25 milligrams two times a day for hypertension and lexapro 10 milligrams a day for anxiety ? looks like Shirley Taylor's allergic to sulfa drugs as well . is the sulfa drug allergy correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Shirley Taylor is still taking carvedilol and lexapro and sulfa just causes Shirley Taylor to break out in a rash .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and no history of thyroid issues , right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . thank you ms. taylor . Dr. Lopez will be right back for Shirley Taylor's exam . Dr. Lopez wants to look up the medication Shirley Taylor mentioned for Shirley Taylor's nerve pain .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right . thanks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: review of systems , please make the following changes . uh , constitutional , patient reports fatigue and weight gain . gi , um , excessive appetite and bloating . eyes , floaters . uh , cardiovascular , shortness of breath and leg swelling . endocrine , positive diabetes , always hungry . skin , nail bed trenches , dryness , itching . musculoskeletal , gout , muscle pain . neurological , parasthesia , bilateral hands . um , please use the default normal neuro-physical exam with the following changes . sensations normal except pin prick sensation diminished in the third and forth fingers on the right hand . and the fourth and fifth fingers on the left hand . reflexes are one plus and symmetric , two plus knees , toes are down going bilaterally , tinel's sign positive at both wrists and both elbows . let's move onto assessment and plan , bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome , question of bilateral cubital tunnel syndrome . Dr. Lopez discussed Dr. Lopez's impression with Shirley Taylor , Dr. Lopez will schedule Shirley Taylor for emg , ncv . if Shirley Taylor's symptoms do not resolve , Dr. Lopez and Shirley Taylor can consider hand clinic referral for possible symptomatic injections or carpal tunnel release surgery although Shirley Taylor can pursue symptomatic injections or carpal tunnel release surgery uh , through Shirley Taylor's current orthopedist . Dr. Lopez encouraged Shirley Taylor to wear Shirley Taylor's splints , returned for emg , ncv . end of note .
